title: [v3.0.1-rhel] repair the install.tools make target
body:
Instead of using `go get -u` in `make install.tools`, use `go get`, and pin a couple of dependency versions to avoid unintentionally updating them.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
